user.title: Smart Thermostat Knob
user.description: Give this Smart Knob a name and select the Home Assistant entities that should become its pages.

data_description.name: A unique, recognizable name for this physical Smart Knob.
data_description.climates: Select one or more climate entities.
data_description.lights: Select one or more light entities.
data_description.esphome_config_entity: Select this knob's ESPHome text entity named Home Assistant Config Entity. The matching restart button is detected automatically.
data_description.covers: Select one or more cover entities (shutters, blinds, curtains).

reconfigure.title: Configure Smart Thermostat Knob
reconfigure.description: Change this Smart Knob's name and the entities shown on it.

data_description.name: A unique, recognizable name for this physical Smart Knob.
data_description.climates: Select one or more climate entities.
data_description.lights: Select one or more light entities.
data_description.esphome_config_entity: Select this knob's ESPHome text entity named Home Assistant Config Entity. The matching restart button is detected automatically.
data_description.covers: Select one or more cover entities (shutters, blinds, curtains).
